stories.title: Add test coverage reporting with nyc/Istanbul
acceptanceCriteria: package.json includes 'coverage' script using nyc
Running 'pnpm coverage' generates coverage report in coverage/ directory
Coverage report shows line, branch, and function coverage percentages
jest.config.cjs is configured to collect coverage data

stories.title: Configure ESLint with TypeScript rules
acceptanceCriteria: .eslintrc.json exists with TypeScript-specific rules configured
ESLint dependencies are upgraded to latest compatible versions
Running 'pnpm lint' passes without errors on existing code
ESLint config includes rules for no-console, no-magic-numbers

stories.title: Configure Prettier for code formatting
acceptanceCriteria: .prettierrc file exists with sensible defaults
package.json includes 'format' script
Running 'pnpm format' formats all TypeScript files
.prettierignore file exists to exclude dist/, node_modules/

stories.title: Add husky and lint-staged for pre-commit hooks
acceptanceCriteria: husky is installed and configured
lint-staged is configured in package.json
.husky/pre-commit hook exists and runs lint-staged
Pre-commit hook runs on staged .ts files only

stories.title: Implement configurable logger to replace console output
acceptanceCriteria: src/lib/logger.ts exists with Logger interface and implementation
ILogger interface defines error, warn, info, debug methods
ConsoleLogger and SilentLogger implementations exist
Logger is configurable via AHE_LOG_LEVEL environment variable
All console.error/console.log calls in src/ are replaced with logger
All existing tests still pass after logger refactoring

stories.title: Extract magic numbers to configuration
acceptanceCriteria: Magic numbers in tracer.ts (slice limits 10, 200) are replaced with config
MAX_ISSUES_PER_CATEGORY constant or config option exists
MAX_ERROR_PREVIEW_LENGTH constant or config option exists
All magic numbers are replaced with named constants or config values

stories.title: Add interface abstractions for core components
acceptanceCriteria: src/types/interfaces.ts exists with ITraceManager interface
src/types/interfaces.ts includes IAnalyzer interface
src/types/interfaces.ts includes ILogger interface
TraceManager class implements ITraceManager
AHEAnalyzer class implements IAnalyzer
Interfaces are exported from src/types/index.ts

stories.title: Refactor synchronous I/O to async I/O
acceptanceCriteria: All *Sync fs functions in tracer.ts are replaced with async equivalents
TraceManager methods return Promises where I/O is involved
Hook files (trace-collector.ts, session-summarizer.ts) properly await async calls
All existing tests still pass after async refactoring

stories.title: Add integration tests
acceptanceCriteria: tests/integration/ directory exists
Integration test for trace-collector hook exists and passes
Integration test for session-summarizer hook exists and passes
Integration tests use temporary directories for isolation
Running 'pnpm test' includes integration tests

stories.title: Add GitHub Actions CI/CD workflow
acceptanceCriteria: .github/workflows/ci.yml exists
CI workflow runs on push to main and pull requests
CI workflow includes: install, build, lint, test steps
CI workflow uses pnpm
CI workflow uploads coverage report as artifact

stories.title: Upgrade dependencies to latest versions
acceptanceCriteria: All devDependencies are updated to latest compatible versions
All dependencies are updated to latest compatible versions
All tests pass after dependency upgrades
Build succeeds after dependency upgrades

stories.title: Add CONTRIBUTING.md documentation
acceptanceCriteria: CONTRIBUTING.md exists at project root
Document includes development setup instructions
Document includes code style guidelines
Document includes commit message conventions
Document includes PR submission process

stories.title: Add CHANGELOG.md
acceptanceCriteria: CHANGELOG.md exists at project root
Follows Keep a Changelog format
Includes entries for 0.1.0 (initial release)
Includes entries for 0.2.0 (this improvement release)

stories.title: Add GitHub PR template
acceptanceCriteria: .github/pull_request_template.md exists
Template includes checklist for tests
Template includes checklist for documentation
Template includes checklist for breaking changes
